Name: MapDefaultInfoParam
Description: Determines the parameters that relate to map info defaults.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Shadow Sight Type
Fields.Description: The AI sight visibility type to use for this map when in shadows.

Fields.Name: Indoor Sound Type
Fields.Description: The indoor sound type to apply in the map GD settings for 'indoor'.

Fields.Name: Default Reverb Type
Fields.Description: The default reverb sewttings to use for this map.

Fields.Name: Additional Sound Bank ID
Fields.Description: A sound bank ID to use as an additional sound bank. -1 for none.

Fields.Name: Override Global Illumination Settings: XSS
Fields.Description: The global illumination settings to override with for this map if running on the Xbox Series S (XSS).

Fields.Name: Override Global Illumination Settings: XSX
Fields.Description: The global illumination settings to override with for this map if running on the Xbox Series X (XSX).
